name: Bamboo Corner Shelf - Brightroom™
description:
This Bamboo Corner Shelf from Brightroom™ adds extra storage to your existing shelving. Made from natural-shade bamboo, this corner shelf is designed to fit in the corner of a larger shelf to maximize the space in your home. Featuring two slatted shelves that are great for storing condiments, seasonings and more, it's designed for freestanding placement.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
